rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the literature review as part of a grouped list of related marketing studies (alongside Zyung et al. and Chen et al.). The citing paper uses it as a general example that money-back guarantees can signal quality in IVF services, but does not build its model, assumptions, propositions, or analysis on that study. There is no further discussion, reuse of methods or measures, or direct theoretical extension tied to this specific citation.
